s=string.rep;local Z={[0]=1,2,4,8,16,32,64,128,256,512,1024,2048,4096,8192,16384,32768,65536,131072,262144,524288,1048576,2097152,4194304,8388608,16777216,33554432,67108864,134217728,268435456,536870912,1073741824,2147483648,4294967296};local T=function(z)local e,o,S,V=0,0xFFFFFFFF,#z,0;local g=function()e=e+1;return u(z,e,e);end;for u=1,5 do V=V*256+g();end;local u,z=0,0;local function P(v)local H=0;for L=v,1,-1.0 do o=o/2;o=o-o%1;H=H*2;if not(V<o)then V=V-o;H=H+1;end;if o<=0x00FFFFFF then o=o*256;V=V*256+g();end;end;return H;end;local function v(H,L)local X,t,f=L[H],o/2048;t=t-t%1;local p=t*X;if V<p then o=p;t=(2048-X)/32;t=t-t%1;X=X+t;f=0;else o=o-p;V=V-p;local t=X/32;t=t-t%1;X=X-t;f=1;end;L[H]=X;if o<=0x00FFFFFF then o=o*256;V=V*256+g();end;return f;end;local function o(V,g,H)local L=1;for X=1,V do
